name: Modern Life RPG

this is my first character so please bare with me.

A Modern world Rpg Where anything can happen you can be the world's richest man/woman, or owning your own shop/business. you could be a serial killer. anything you put your mind to its possible.

If you don't like the generation you can regenerate it or edit it to the way you like
